# choice-wall (known-bad)

Domain-light illustration. Expect **fail** on R2 (choice wall) and R4 (human act is a free-text multi-menu).

## Agent

Here is the Phase F plan. Pick what you want me to do next by typing one of these in chat:

1. start #15 (recommended)
2. fold open issues into the current PR
3. reprioritize all P1 items
4. skip Phase F and jump to deploy
5. rewrite the plan from scratch

Just reply with the number or the short name. I will wait.

## Operator

Which of these is safest if I am not sure about deploy yet?
